allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: stop duplicate scheduler jobs and logs across workers/replicas' -m 'The dev container ran uvicorn with WORKERS=2, so two processes each ran *)

PowerShell(az group show --name rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --query "{name:name, location:location, state:properties.provisioningState}" -o json; Write-Host "`n=== can I write here? \(dry check via existing resources\) ==="; az resource list --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --query "length\(@\)" -o tsv)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== create db-kirana-uat ==="; az postgres flexible-server db create --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --server-name psql-lohiya-uat --database-name db-kirana-uat --query "name" -o tsv; Write-Host "`n=== create dedicated CAE \(2-5 min\) ==="; az containerapp env create --name cae-lohiya-uat --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --location centralindia --query "{name:name, state:properties.provisioningState}" -o json)

PowerShell($env:DB_HOST="psql-lohiya-uat.postgres.database.azure.com"; $env:DB_USER="psqladmin"; $env:DB_PASSWORD="Lit.psql@uat!"; $env:DB_NAME="db-kirana-uat"; $env:DB_PORT="5432"; python db_generation\\ensure_full_schema.py | Select-Object -Last 2; Write-Host "--- second pass \(clears matview-index ordering skip\) ---"; python db_generation\\ensure_full_schema.py | Select-Object -Last 2)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== KeyVault provider state now ==="; az provider show --namespace Microsoft.KeyVault --query "registrationState" -o tsv; Write-Host "`n=== Key Vaults in dev RG ==="; az keyvault list --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-dev --query "[].{name:name, uri:properties.vaultUri, rbac:properties.enableRbacAuthorization}" -o json; Write-Host "`n=== ca-lohiya-qa config \(for the rename\) ==="; az containerapp show -n ca-lohiya-qa -g rg-lohiya-outlet-dev --query "{image:properties.template.containers[0].image, min:properties.template.scale.minReplicas, max:properties.template.scale.maxReplicas, env_count:length\(properties.template.containers[0].env\)}" -o json)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== copy env from ca-lohiya-uat ==="; $envs = az containerapp show -n ca-lohiya-uat -g rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --query "properties.template.containers[0].env" -o json | ConvertFrom-Json; $pairs = $envs | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.name\)=$\($_.value\)" }; Write-Host "copied $\($pairs.Count\) env vars"; Write-Host "`n=== create ca-lohiya-outlet-uat ==="; az containerapp create --name ca-lohiya-outlet-uat --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --environment cae-lohiya-uat --image "crlohiyakirana-c8eye2huc9g2b6h6.azurecr.io/kirana-backend:v20260607-0438" --target-port 9000 --ingress external --registry-server "crlohiyakirana-c8eye2huc9g2b6h6.azurecr.io" --registry-username "crlohiyakirana" --registry-password "GKsbXQXPmjWrXr2UBUCVrOkdOkGfLsvaP0KGhpXPPITFgjzBGktnJQQJ99CEACGhslBEqg7NAAACAZCR7QjI" --min-replicas 0 --max-replicas 2 --env-vars $pairs --query "{name:name, fqdn:properties.configuration.ingress.fqdn, state:properties.provisioningState}" -o json)

PowerShell($fqdn="ca-lohiya-outlet-uat.ambitiouspond-d8177a23.centralindia.azurecontainerapps.io"; $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 12;$i++\){ try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod "https://$fqdn/health" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "status=$\($h.status\) pos=$\($h.pos\) wa_send=$\($h.whatsapp.send_enabled\) mistral=$\($h.whatsapp.mistral_set\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 } }; if\($ok\){ Write-Host "`n=== delete old ca-lohiya-uat ==="; az containerapp delete --name ca-lohiya-uat --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --yes --output none; Write-Host "deleted \(exit $LASTEXITCODE\)" } else { Write-Host "new app not healthy — NOT deleting old" })

PowerShell($principal = az containerapp show --name ca-lohiya-outlet-uat --resource-group rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --query "identity.principalId" -o tsv; Write-Host "app principalId=$principal"; az keyvault set-policy --name kv-lohiya-uat --object-id $principal --secret-permissions get list --query "properties.provisioningState" -o tsv)

PowerShell($fqdn="ca-lohiya-outlet-uat.ambitiouspond-d8177a23.centralindia.azurecontainerapps.io"; $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 15;$i++\){ try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod "https://$fqdn/health" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "status=$\($h.status\) pos=$\($h.pos\) wa_send=$\($h.whatsapp.send_enabled\) mistral=$\($h.whatsapp.mistral_set\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Host "no health response — checking logs"; az containerapp logs show -n ca-lohiya-outlet-uat -g rg-lohiya-outlet-UAT --tail 30 --query "[].Log" -o tsv 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 15 })
